rulings.Case Title: LORA STEWART VS. UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees & Costs Pursuant To Mediation
rulings.Rulings: Set For Hearing On Thursday, December 21, 2006, Line 5, CLAIMANT STEPHEN DOUGAN'S Motion For Attorney's Fees & Costs Pursuant To Mediation. GRANT MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. 1)EVIDENCE SHOWS NO AUTOMATIC STAY BECAUSE REQUEST TO ARBITRATE UNTIMELY; EVIDENCE SHOWS 11/1/06 STAMP DATE, SHELL CONTACTED MEDIATOR ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF 11/1/06. 2)NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. =(302/REQ/KD)
